description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest Docker image with a docker:dind service and caches the node_modules directory using a key based on the project path slug and commit ref slug. Define two stages, build and deploy. In the build stage add a build job that runs on all branches except master, runs the shared before_script to docker login, then executes `docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG" .` and `docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG"`. Also in the build stage add a build-master job that runs only on the master branch, uses the same login step, builds the image with tag `$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE` and pushes it. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that runs only on master and is skipped when the commit message matches /skip-deploy/, uses the alpine:latest image, runs `apk update` and `apk add openssh-client`, writes the `$PROD_SSH_KEY` secret to a file, sets its mode to 0600, and SSHes to evkon@collaba-tube.northeurope.cloudapp.azure.com to execute `cd code/deploy && make pull-frontend start-frontend`, deploying to the production environment at https://collabatube.com/.
